title: Bitwarden: client.internal private API is fragile across SDK upgrades
description:
## Problem
secretx-bitwarden/src/lib.rs calls client.internal.get_access_token_organization() where .internal is a private/hidden field on the bitwarden SDK Client type. This compiles today against bitwarden 2.0.0 but is not part of the public API contract. Any SDK refactor that renames or removes the .internal field will break compilation with no deprecation warning.

## Risk
Compile break on next bitwarden SDK minor/patch version. Discovered via source inspection of bitwarden 2.0.0.

## Options
1. File upstream issue asking for a public get_organization() accessor.
2. Pin bitwarden = "=2.0.0" (exact pin) and document the reason.
3. Accept the risk with a comment that names the SDK field and version tested.

## Acceptance
Either: upstream public accessor available and used, OR exact version pin with comment, OR a clear code comment naming the private field and SDK version with a TODO to track the upstream issue.
